ARCHITECT_ATTACK_READINGS_POWER.title: Aggressive Readings
ARCHITECT_ATTACK_READINGS_POWER.descript: Whenever an enemy plays an Attack this turn, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Vigor[/gold].
ARCHITECT_ATTACK_READINGS_POWER.smartDes: Whenever an enemy plays an Attack this turn, gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Vigor[/gold].
ARCHITECT_ATTACK_READINGS_POWER.2pDescri: Each time enemies have played [blue]2[/blue] Attacks this turn, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Vigor[/gold].
ARCHITECT_ATTACK_READINGS_POWER.2pSmartD: Each time enemies have played [blue]2[/blue] Attacks this turn, gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Vigor[/gold].
ARCHITECT_ATTACK_READINGS_POWER.3pDescri: Each time enemies have played [blue]3[/blue] Attacks this turn, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Vigor[/gold].
ARCHITECT_ATTACK_READINGS_POWER.3pSmartD: Each time enemies have played [blue]3[/blue] Attacks this turn, gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Vigor[/gold].
ARCHITECT_ATTACK_READINGS_POWER.coopDesc: Each time enemies have played [blue]4[/blue] Attacks this turn, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Vigor[/gold].
ARCHITECT_ATTACK_READINGS_POWER.coopSmar: Each time enemies have played [blue]4[/blue] Attacks this turn, gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Vigor[/gold].
ARCHITECT_SKILL_READINGS_POWER.title: Tactical Readings
ARCHITECT_SKILL_READINGS_POWER.descripti: Whenever an enemy plays a Skill this turn, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Vigor[/gold].
ARCHITECT_SKILL_READINGS_POWER.smartDesc: Whenever an enemy plays a Skill this turn, gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Vigor[/gold].
ARCHITECT_SKILL_READINGS_POWER.2pDescrip: Each time enemies have played [blue]2[/blue] Skills this turn, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Vigor[/gold].
ARCHITECT_SKILL_READINGS_POWER.2pSmartDe: Each time enemies have played [blue]2[/blue] Skills this turn, gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Vigor[/gold].
ARCHITECT_SKILL_READINGS_POWER.3pDescrip: Each time enemies have played [blue]3[/blue] Skills this turn, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Vigor[/gold].
ARCHITECT_SKILL_READINGS_POWER.3pSmartDe: Each time enemies have played [blue]3[/blue] Skills this turn, gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Vigor[/gold].
ARCHITECT_SKILL_READINGS_POWER.coopDescr: Each time enemies have played [blue]4[/blue] Skills this turn, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Vigor[/gold].
ARCHITECT_SKILL_READINGS_POWER.coopSmart: Each time enemies have played [blue]4[/blue] Skills this turn, gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Vigor[/gold].
ARCHITECT_BLOCK_CAP_POWER.title: Reinforced Design
ARCHITECT_BLOCK_CAP_POWER.description: While [gold]The Architect[/gold] has [gold]Block[/gold], Block is not removed at end of turn and it can lose at most [blue]99[/blue] HP from each Attack.
ARCHITECT_BLOCK_CAP_POWER.smartDescripti: While [gold]The Architect[/gold] has [gold]Block[/gold], Block is not removed at end of turn and it can lose at most [blue]{Amount}[/blue] HP from each Attack.
ARCHITECT_BLOCK_PIERCER_POWER.title: Block Piercer
ARCHITECT_BLOCK_PIERCER_POWER.smartDescr: Pierces through [blue]25%[/blue] of Block for [blue]{Amount}[/blue] more rounds.
ARCHITECT_ALL_OR_NOTHING_POWER.title: All or Nothing
ARCHITECT_ALL_OR_NOTHING_POWER.descripti: If The Architect takes more than [blue]{Amount}%[/blue] of Max HP in damage this turn, it is stunned. If it is attacked and takes less, it gains [gold]50[/gold] [gold]Vigor[/gold]. This status expires this turn.
ARCHITECT_ALL_OR_NOTHING_POWER.smartDesc: If The Architect takes more than [blue]{Amount}%[/blue] of Max HP in damage this turn, it is stunned. If it is attacked and takes less, it gains [gold]50[/gold] [gold]Vigor[/gold]. This status expires this turn.
ARCHITECT_ADAPTIVE_RESISTANCE_POWER.desc: Immediately when [gold]Poison[/gold] or [gold]Doom[/gold] is applied, expels [blue]{Amount}%[/blue] of newly added stacks and deals that damage to itself (max [blue]25%[/blue] max HP). At start of Architect turn, clears [blue]30%[/blue] of all debuff stacks. Each enemy turn, negative [gold]Strength[/gold] is transferred to all Players and reset to [blue]1[/blue].
ARCHITECT_ADAPTIVE_RESISTANCE_POWER.smar: Immediately when [gold]Poison[/gold] or [gold]Doom[/gold] is applied, expels [blue]{Amount}%[/blue] of newly added stacks and deals that damage to itself (max [blue]25%[/blue] max HP). At start of Architect turn, clears [blue]30%[/blue] of all debuff stacks. Each enemy turn, negative [gold]Strength[/gold] is transferred to all Players and reset to [blue]1[/blue].
ARCHITECT_ADAPTIVE_ARMOR_POWER.title: Adaptive Armor
ARCHITECT_ADAPTIVE_ARMOR_POWER.descripti: Block is not removed at the end of each turn. Each Attack deals at most [blue]999[/blue] damage to The Architect.
ARCHITECT_ADAPTIVE_ARMOR_POWER.smartDesc: Block is not removed at the end of each turn. Each Attack deals at most [blue]999[/blue] damage to The Architect.
ARCHITECT_JUDGMENT_POWER.title: Judgment
ARCHITECT_JUDGMENT_POWER.description: If The Architect takes more than 20% HP in damage this turn, cleanse all buffs from Players. This status expires this turn.
ARCHITECT_JUDGMENT_POWER.smartDescriptio: If The Architect takes [blue]{Amount}%[/blue] more HP in damage this turn, cleanse all buffs from Players. This status expires this turn.
ARCHITECT_STUNNED_POWER.title: Stunned
ARCHITECT_STUNNED_POWER.description: This creature is stunned and cannot act normally this turn.
ARCHITECT_STUNNED_POWER.smartDescription: This creature is stunned and cannot act normally this turn.
ARCHITECT_RETALIATION_POWER.title: Retaliation
ARCHITECT_RETALIATION_POWER.description: At [blue]80%[/blue] and [blue]30%[/blue] HP: Summon. At [blue]50%[/blue] HP: Interrupts the player's turn and acts immediately. Stack Count = The Architect's HP %.
ARCHITECT_OBLIVION_POWER.title: OBLIVION
ARCHITECT_OBLIVION_POWER.description: The Architect is going to send you to OBLIVION soon. Eliminate him before he does. He also loses [blue]5%[/blue] HP per Round charging OBLIVION.
ARCHITECT_OBLIVION_POWER.smartDescriptio: [blue]{Amount}[/blue] Rounds until The Architect sends you to OBLIVION. He also loses [blue]5%[/blue] HP per Round charging OBLIVION. Beat him down fast!
MYSTERIOUS_SPORES_POWER.title: Mysterious Spores
MYSTERIOUS_SPORES_POWER.description: When this creature dies, the killer heals [blue]30%[/blue] HP.
SPORE_NOURISHMENT_POWER.title: Spore Nourishment
SPORE_NOURISHMENT_POWER.description: At the end of each enemy turn, heal [gold]The Architect[/gold] for [blue]5%[/blue] of its Max HP.
ARCHITECT_SUMMON_THORNS_POWER.title: Shadow Thorns
ARCHITECT_SUMMON_THORNS_POWER.descriptio: The Architect has [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Thorns[/gold] while [gold]Shadows[/gold] are on the field. Eliminate the [gold]Shadows[/gold] to remove The Architect's [gold]Thorns[/gold].
ARCHITECT_SUMMON_THORNS_POWER.smartDescr: The Architect has [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Thorns[/gold] while [gold]Shadows[/gold] are on the field. Eliminate the [gold]Shadows[/gold] to remove The Architect's [gold]Thorns[/gold].
CURSED_TOME_PLAYER_BONUS_POWER.title: Forbidden Knowledge
CURSED_TOME_PLAYER_BONUS_POWER.descripti: You are Cursed by the Architect's forbidden tome. Gain [blue]2[/blue] extra max [gold]Energy[/gold] and draw [blue]2[/blue] extra cards each turn.
CURSED_TOME_PLAYER_BONUS_POWER.smartDesc: You are Cursed by the Architect's forbidden tome. Gain [blue]2[/blue] extra max [gold]Energy[/gold] and draw [blue]2[/blue] extra cards each turn.
LINKED_SHADOW_POWER.title: Linked Shadow
LINKED_SHADOW_POWER.description: If this Shadow dies, decreases The Architect's HP by [blue]10%[/blue] of its Max HP.
LINKED_SHADOW_POWER.smartDescription: If this Shadow dies, decreases The Architect's HP by [blue]10%[/blue] of its Max HP.
